title: Two killed in separate Asla Park incidents
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police are investigating two cases of murder following two separate stabbing incidents in Asla Park on Saturday 1 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police are investigating two cases of murder following two separate stabbing incidents in Asla Park on Saturday 1 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The first murder took place at about 05:30 that morning. Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, the station’s spokesperson, said according to reports, a neighbour of the 20-year-old Tshepiso Maqaza had heard the young man calling out for help."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When he went round to Maqaza’s house and opened the door, he found him lying at the entrance with a stab wound to his body. The police were alerted and emergency medical services declared Maqaza dead on the scene.","html":"When he went round to Maqaza’s house and opened the door, he found him lying at the entrance with a stab wound to his body. The police were alerted and emergency medical services declared Maqaza dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No arrests have been made at this stage.","html":"No arrests have been made at this stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a separate incident at about 15:30 that afternoon, the police were called out to Mabolo Street.","html":"In a separate incident at about 15:30 that afternoon, the police were called out to Mabolo Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A 41-year-old man, who cannot yet be named until his next of kin have been notified of his death, was found lying in the street with a stab wound to his chest.","html":"A 41-year-old man, who cannot yet be named until his next of kin have been notified of his death, was found lying in the street with a stab wound to his chest."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Emergency medical services declared him dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No arrests have been made yet, but Kapp said one is imminent.","html":"No arrests have been made yet, but Kapp said one is imminent."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Warrant Officer Geoffrey Moos is the investigating officer for both cases. If you have any information on these two matters, contact him on 044 606 5629.","html":"Warrant Officer Geoffrey Moos is the investigating officer for both cases. If you have any information on these two matters, contact him on 044 606 5629."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
